rows.definition: The kernel itself: the in-process adjudication system that runs the decision chain and admits results, launched as `fak guard`.
rows.distinction: A SYSTEM - NOT a gate (one decision point inside it) and NOT the trunk/repo guards (git-side policy checks).

rows.definition: One decision point inside a guard, splitting by WHEN it fires: pre-call adjudicators, post-call result admitters, and git-hook gates.
rows.distinction: A POINT, not the system - NOT the guard (the whole kernel) and NOT any single gate kind (adjudicator vs admitter vs hook).

rows.definition: A post-call gate: inspects a tool RESULT after execution and admits / quarantines / transforms it (ctxmmu, normgate, secretgate).
rows.distinction: Fires POST-call on result bytes - NOT the adjudicator (pre-call, on the request) and NOT a git-hook gate (commit boundary).

rows.definition: A commit-boundary check at git pre-commit / commit-msg (gate_brokenlink, gate_secretshape, gate_provenance, ...).
rows.distinction: A STATIC commit-boundary check - NOT gitgate (a runtime git-command prefilter) and NOT a result admitter (post-tool).

rows.definition: A git hook that refuses commits made off the trunk (the OFF_TRUNK law), keeping all work on main.
rows.distinction: A branch-STATE policy (refuse OFF_TRUNK) - NOT repo guard (write-target policy) and NOT gitgate (git-command prefilter).

rows.definition: A PreToolUse hook that refuses Bash/Write/Edit calls targeting paths outside the workspace tree.
rows.distinction: A write-TARGET policy (block escaping the tree) - NOT trunk guard (branch state) and NOT gitgate (git subcommands).

rows.definition: An adjudicator rung that prefilters git hazards (force-push, --no-verify, rebase -i) from shell tool calls at runtime.
rows.distinction: A runtime git-COMMAND prefilter - NOT git-hook gates (static commit-boundary checks) and NOT trunk guard (branch state).

rows.definition: An adjudicator that enforces RSI keep-or-revert verdicts on a code change based on witness-verified metric gain, never the candidate's own claim.
rows.distinction: Gates a CODE improvement on proven gain - NOT an L3 cache promotion gate (durability class) and NOT a result-admitter gate.

rows.definition: A ResultAdmitter that canonicalizes obfuscated payloads (base64, homoglyph, zero-width) before re-scanning for secrets.
rows.distinction: Detection-CLOSURE (decode then detect) - NOT secretgate (discovery-classification) and NOT ctxmmu (generic quarantine).
gaps: the individual result-admitter rungs are not yet written into the glossary

rows.definition: A ResultAdmitter that classifies discovered credentials as RESULT_SECRET_DISCOVERED events, distinct from injection poisoning.
rows.distinction: Discovery-CLASSIFICATION (mark credentials) - NOT normgate (detection-closure) and NOT ctxmmu (generic quarantine).
gaps: the individual result-admitter rungs are not yet written into the glossary
